name: /architect ADR auto-generation writes one ADR per decision into the docs/adr directory
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect.sh" "input" --decisions-stub d1,d2 --adr-out docs/adr --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f docs/adr/0001-d1.md ] && [ -f docs/adr/0002-d2.md ] && echo ok 1>&2
